genre_refs: representational/realist American landscape painting; titled 'An American Dream' by William Brody
description: A reproduction of a representational oil/acrylic painting shared as-is, with no agency-applied text, slogan, logo, or graphic overlay on the image itself (the attribution 'An American Dream' by William Brody appears only in the tweet text, not on the picture). The painting depicts a small-town American scene on a sunny day: a white Victorian/Queen Anne house with an ornate gingerbread-trimmed front porch from which a large American flag hangs, hanging baskets of orange flowers, a wooden rocking chair and a sunburst decoration on the porch. A brick/stone walkway lined with colorful flower beds and a black lamppost leads to the steps; a dark red barn and white picket fence sit to the left amid green trees and lawn under a clear blue sky. The artist's signature is visible in the lower right. The style is painterly realism with bright, warm colors. It is a fine-art image distributed without designed on-image text. The tweet reads 'We're fighting for the American Dream'.
